title: extraction_result
description: Intermediate output of StructureExtractor. NOT the final structured_prompt. May contain empty fields and noise_candidates.

goal.description: Extracted goal. Empty string when absent — goal_source will be 'missing'.

constraints.description: Constraints extracted from the prompt. Empty array when none present.

output_format.description: Extracted output format. Empty string when absent — output_format_source will be 'missing'.

noise_candidates.description: Phrases identified as likely noise. Passed to ConflictDetector and OutputBuilder for removal decision.

x-hard_rules: goal_source must be 'missing' when goal is empty string
output_format_source must be 'missing' when output_format is empty string
noise_candidates are candidates only — removal requires validation by OutputBuilder
This schema is for StructureExtractor output only. Final cleaned artifacts use structured_prompt.json.
